meaning: adj.爱琴海的n.爱琴海(地中海的一部分,在希腊同土耳其之间)
examples: I'd love to go diving in the Aegean.
Spyros Latsis started his career as a humble fisherman in the Aegean.
The hollowed-out A300 was stripped of everything potentially harmful to the environment and sunk off the Aegean coast today.
With all this tiring ruin-visiting, it is nice to always have a number of Aegean beaches nearby.
These houses command sweeping views of the Aegean and, on clear days, other Cycladic islands.
